page.title: Post-Race Relaxation: Yacht Charter for Marbella Ironman Recovery

data.meta_description: Recover from Marbella Ironman with a private yacht charter. Sail the Costa del Sol, soothe muscles in the sun, and celebrate with crew. Book your post-race relaxation.
data.summary: Discover how a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús offers the ultimate post-Marbella Ironman recovery, combining gentle sea breezes, swimming stops, and onboard refreshments to ease tired muscles and celebrate your achievement.
key_facts: All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella, minutes from the Ironman finish line.
Boats include licensed skipper, fuel, soft drinks, beer, wine, cava, and light snacks.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749 for 2 hours to €2,299 for 8 hours.
Tier B Mangusta 80 (24m) from €4,719 minimum 4h, includes a free jet ski.
Maximum pax ranges from 5 to 12 depending on the vessel.
Swimming stops at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for muscle recovery.
All prices include Spanish IVA (21%) and full insurance.
Book via WhatsApp for custom durations and boat availability.

faq.q: How close is Puerto Banús to the Marbella Ironman finish line?
faq.a: Puerto Banús is about 6 km from the Marbella town centre finish line, a 10-minute taxi ride. Most of our yachts depart from the port, so you can be on the water within 30 minutes of finishing the race.

faq.q: Which boat is best for a small group of Ironman athletes?
faq.a: For 5–6 athletes, the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 (both 9–11 pax) offer excellent value from €749 for 2 hours. For a larger team of 10–12, the Mangusta 80 or Azimut 58 Flybridge provide more deck space and include a jet ski on the Mangusta.

faq.q: Can we swim during the charter to help muscle recovery?
faq.a: Yes. All charters include swimming stops at calm spots like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. The salt water and gentle swimming aid muscle recovery after the Ironman. Life jackets and safety equipment are provided.

faq.q: What food and drinks are included on board?
faq.a: Every charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks (e.g., crisps, nuts, olives). You can also bring your own food or order a catering upgrade via WhatsApp.

faq.q: How long should we charter for post-Ironman?
faq.a: A 2-hour cruise is enough for a quick dip and drink. For a full recovery afternoon with lunch, swimming, and sunset views, 4–8 hours is recommended. Tier A boats cost €1,299 for 4 hours.

faq.q: Do we need to bring anything for the yacht charter?
faq.a: Bring swimwear, a towel, sunscreen, and a light jacket for the breeze. The skipper handles navigation and safety. Towels are not provided on board, so pack your own.

faq.q: Is the yacht charter suitable for non-athlete family members?
faq.a: Absolutely. Yachts like the Fairline Targa 12m or Lagoon 380 are family-friendly with shaded areas and stable hulls. Non-athletes can relax while athletes recover.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for Marbella Ironman recovery?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and desired duration. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. Prices include VAT and all listed inclusions.

data.body_html:
Crossing the Marbella Ironman finish line is a monumental achievement. After months of training, your body deserves more than a quick stretch and a protein shake. A private yacht charter from Puerto Banús offers the ultimate post-race recovery: gentle sea breezes, a swim in the Mediterranean, and cold drinks with your crew. This guide explains how to turn your finish-line euphoria into a floating celebration, with concrete prices, boat options, and local knowledge.

Why a Yacht Charter Works for Ironman Recovery

Endurance athletes know that active recovery beats sitting still. A slow cruise along the Costa del Sol keeps blood flowing without impact. The salt water at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés helps reduce inflammation, while the sun and sea air promote relaxation. All our charters include a licensed skipper, so you do nothing but rest, swim, and sip. The gentle motion of a 12-metre hull like the Astondoa 40 is ideal for tired legs.

Best Boats for Post-Ironman Groups

Choose your vessel based on group size and budget. For a small team of 5–6, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) start at €749 for 2 hours. For a larger squad of up to 12, the Mangusta 80 (24m) costs €4,719 minimum 4 hours and includes a free jet ski for those who want a thrill. The Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m) offers a spacious flybridge for sunbathing. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.

Sample Recovery Itinerary

A 4-hour charter (€1,199 for Tier A boats) works perfectly post-race. Depart Puerto Banús at 14:00, cruise east past the Golden Mile. Stop for a 30-minute swim at Cala Cortés, a quiet cove with calm water. Enjoy cold beer, cava, and light snacks on deck. Head back to port by 18:00, with time for a shower before dinner. For a longer afternoon, the 8-hour option (€2,299) includes a lunch stop at a beach club or a second swim at Cabopino.

Swimming Spots for Muscle Recovery

The Mediterranean along Marbella offers several sheltered coves. Cala del Faro near the Marbella lighthouse has shallow, clear water — perfect for gentle swimming. Cala Cortés is slightly larger and often quieter. Both are within 20 minutes of Puerto Banús. Our skippers know the best anchorages based on wind and sea conditions. Swimming in 22–26°C water in June–September aids muscle repair without stressing joints.

What’s Included in Every Charter

No hidden extras. Every booking includes: a licensed English-speaking skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, full insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel. If you want a catered lunch or extra drinks, let us know via WhatsApp — we can arrange it.

Booking for Ironman Weekend

Marbella Ironman typically takes place in late September or early October. Book early — yachts fill up fast. Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and desired duration. We'll confirm availability and send a secure booking link. Prices are fixed and transparent. See our full fleet at Boat Rental Marbella for more options.

Frequently Asked Questions

How close is Puerto Banús to the Marbella Ironman finish line?

Puerto Banús is about 6 km from the Marbella town centre finish line, a 10-minute taxi ride. Most of our yachts depart from the port, so you can be on the water within 30 minutes of finishing the race.

Which boat is best for a small group of Ironman athletes?

For 5–6 athletes, the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 (both 9–11 pax) offer excellent value from €749 for 2 hours. For a larger team of 10–12, the Mangusta 80 or Azimut 58 Flybridge provide more deck space and include a jet ski on the Mangusta.

Can we swim during the charter to help muscle recovery?

Yes. All charters include swimming stops at calm spots like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. The salt water and gentle swimming aid muscle recovery after the Ironman. Life jackets and safety equipment are provided.

What food and drinks are included on board?

Every charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks (e.g., crisps, nuts, olives). You can also bring your own food or order a catering upgrade via WhatsApp.

How long should we charter for post-Ironman?

A 2-hour cruise is enough for a quick dip and drink. For a full recovery afternoon with lunch, swimming, and sunset views, 4–8 hours is recommended. Tier A boats cost €1,299 for 4 hours.

Do we need to bring anything for the yacht charter?

Bring swimwear, a towel, sunscreen, and a light jacket for the breeze. The skipper handles navigation and safety. Towels are not provided on board, so pack your own.

Is the yacht charter suitable for non-athlete family members?

Absolutely. Yachts like the Fairline Targa 12m or Lagoon 380 are family-friendly with shaded areas and stable hulls. Non-athletes can relax while athletes recover.

How do I book a yacht for Marbella Ironman recovery?

Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and desired duration. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. Prices include VAT and all listed inclusions.
